| 296 | [Source ATS Plugin: Eightfold](../.specify/specs/296-source-ats-eightfold/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/296-source-ats-eightfold/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/296-source-ats-eightfold/tasks.md) | All phases done (T01..T06 run #400); spec complete. Generic multi-tenant Eightfold AI ("PCSX" / SmartApply) ATS adapter over the public `/api/apply/v2/jobs` positions API; bounded concurrent page fan-out (≤8) with `Promise.allSettled`; `companySlug`/`companyUrl` tenant resolution. WAF-gated tenants deferred (Q-043). |
| 297 | [Source ATS Plugin: Cornerstone OnDemand](../.specify/specs/297-source-ats-cornerstone/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/297-source-ats-cornerstone/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/297-source-ats-cornerstone/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #401); spec complete. Generic multi-tenant Cornerstone OnDemand (CSOD) ATS adapter. Anonymous two-step bootstrap: GET the public career-site page (yields an anonymous JWT + regional "cloud" API host), then `POST {cloud}/rec-job-search/external/jobs` paginated by `pageNumber`/`pageSize=25` with bounded `Promise.allSettled` fan-out. `companySlug`→`{slug}.csod.com` / `companyUrl` resolution; `siteNumber` overrides careerSiteId. WAF-gated tenants & the credentialed OAuth API deferred. |
| 298 | [Source ATS Plugin: Dayforce](../.specify/specs/298-source-ats-dayforce/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/298-source-ats-dayforce/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/298-source-ats-dayforce/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #401); spec complete. Generic multi-tenant Ceridian Dayforce HCM candidate-portal ATS adapter over the no-auth geo feed `POST https://jobs.dayforcehcm.com/api/geo/{client}/jobposting/search` (`jobBoardCode: CANDIDATEPORTAL`); server-fixed page size 25 paginated via `paginationStart` with bounded `Promise.allSettled` fan-out; reads both camelCase geo and PascalCase RESTful wire shapes defensively. Client resolves from `companySlug`/`siteNumber`/`companyUrl`. WAF/TLS-fingerprint bypass deferred (Q-044). |
| 299 | [Source ATS Plugin: Zoho Recruit](../.specify/specs/299-source-ats-zohorecruit/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/299-source-ats-zohorecruit/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/299-source-ats-zohorecruit/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #401); spec complete. Generic multi-tenant Zoho Recruit ATS adapter. Wires the previously-orphaned `Site.ZOHORECRUIT` enum member to a real plugin. Zoho server-renders the full open-roles list into `GET https://{slug}.zohorecruit.com/jobs/Careers` as an HTML-entity-encoded JSON array inside a hidden `<input id="jobs">`; the service fetches once, decodes, JSON-parses defensively, and maps `Job_Openings` fields. `companySlug` (US `.com` default) / `companyUrl` (EU/IN datacenters) resolution. OAuth REST API & WAF tenants deferred. |
| 300 | [Source ATS Plugin: ClearCompany](../.specify/specs/300-source-ats-clearcompany/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/300-source-ats-clearcompany/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/300-source-ats-clearcompany/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #401); spec complete. Generic multi-tenant ClearCompany ATS adapter over the verified public feed `GET https://careers-page.clearcompany.com/api/v1/careers/jobs` with an `API-ShortName: {slug}` header — returns the tenant's full open-roles list as a flat PascalCase JSON array (no auth, no pagination envelope). Slug resolves from `companySlug` or the `companyUrl` `/jobs/{slug}` path segment; dedup by job GUID. WAF tenants & per-job enrichment deferred. |
| 301 | [Source ATS Plugin: Niceboard](../.specify/specs/301-source-ats-niceboard/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/301-source-ats-niceboard/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/301-source-ats-niceboard/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #402); spec complete. Generic multi-tenant adapter for Niceboard-hosted job boards. Pages the verified public board search feed `GET https://{slug}.niceboard.co/api/jobs` (the call the board SPA makes) with a fixed JSON-encoded base query → `{ jobs, count }` with embedded `description_html`; `limit`/`page` pagination via bounded `Promise.allSettled`. No auth (the credentialed `/api/v1/jobs?key=` route is not used). |
| 302 | [Source ATS Plugin: GoHire](../.specify/specs/302-source-ats-gohire/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/302-source-ats-gohire/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/302-source-ats-gohire/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #402); spec complete. GoHire adapter over the verified public widget feeds: list `GET https://api2.gohire.io/widget-jobs/{clientHash}` → `{ jobs }`, then per-role detail `GET https://api.gohire.io/widget-job?clientHash={hash}&jobId={id}` (bounded fan-out, max 8) for the full HTML description + structured location. Browser UA required; no auth. |
| 303 | [Source ATS Plugin: Recooty](../.specify/specs/303-source-ats-recooty/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/303-source-ats-recooty/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/303-source-ats-recooty/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #402); spec complete. Recooty adapter over the verified public Job Widget feed `GET https://standaloneapi.recooty.app/api/widget/{widgetId}?language=en` → `{ career_page_url, team:{ jobPosts[] } }`. The 32-char hex widget id is a public read key in the URL; `REMOTE/ON_SITE/HYBRID` + `FULL_TIME/…` enums mapped. Unknown id → HTTP 422 handled as empty. No auth. |
| 304 | [Source ATS Plugin: Polymer](../.specify/specs/304-source-ats-polymer/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/304-source-ats-polymer/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/304-source-ats-polymer/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #402); spec complete. Polymer adapter over the verified unauthenticated Public API (`developer.polymer.co`): list `GET https://api.polymer.co/v1/hire/organizations/{slug}/jobs?page={n}&per_page=50` (`{ items, meta }`, walked via `meta.is_last`) + per-job detail `.../jobs/{id}` (concurrency-5 fan-out) for HTML description + department. snake_case wire with camelCase aliases. No auth. |
| 305 | [Source ATS Plugin: VivaHR](../.specify/specs/305-source-ats-vivahr/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/305-source-ats-vivahr/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/305-source-ats-vivahr/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #402); spec complete. VivaHR/AvaHR adapter — no anonymous JSON API exists, so it scrapes the verified public careers HTML at `https://jobs.avahr.com/{tenant}/jobs`, enumerates detail URLs, and parses the schema.org `JobPosting` JSON-LD per detail page (bounded fan-out). `companySlug` = full `{id}-{slug}` token. The per-tenant-keyed developer API is not used. No auth. |
| 306 | [Source ATS Plugin: Occupop](../.specify/specs/306-source-ats-occupop/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/306-source-ats-occupop/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/306-source-ats-occupop/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #402); spec complete. Occupop adapter over the verified unauthenticated Apollo GraphQL gateway: `POST https://gateway.server.occupop.com/graphql` op `LiveJobs` `{ companyKey: "{slug}" }` → `data.careersPage.liveJobs[]`. Query extracted verbatim from the careers SPA bundle (introspection disabled). Unknown key → GraphQL error + `data:null` handled as empty. No auth. |
| 307 | [Source ATS Plugin: JobAdder](../.specify/specs/307-source-ats-jobadder/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/307-source-ats-jobadder/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/307-source-ats-jobadder/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #402); spec complete. JobAdder adapter — the v2 jobs API requires OAuth2, so it scrapes the verified anonymous hosted Careerpage HTML at `https://clientapps.jobadder.com/{accountId}/{slug}`, parsing `job_items` cards + lazy per-role detail fetches (bounded fan-out). Tenant is an `{accountId}/{slug}` pair; unknown → HTTP 404 handled as empty. No auth. |
| 308 | [Source ATS Plugin: Hireology](../.specify/specs/308-source-ats-hireology/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/308-source-ats-hireology/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/308-source-ats-hireology/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #402); spec complete. Hireology adapter — scrapes the anonymous public `window.startingData.apiToken` minted into the careers page, then GETs the verified public feed `https://api.hireology.com/v2/public/careers/{slug}?page={n}&page_size=50` (`Authorization: Bearer {token}`) → `{ data, count }`; paginated via bounded `Promise.allSettled`. The bearer is a public, non-credential read-only token (re-scraped per run). No login. |
| 309 | [Source ATS Plugin: Applied](../.specify/specs/309-source-ats-applied/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/309-source-ats-applied/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/309-source-ats-applied/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #403); spec complete. Applied (beapplied.com) — no anonymous JSON API exists (all `/api/v1/` return HTTP 401), so it scrapes the verified public org page `https://app.beapplied.com/org/{orgId}/{orgSlug}`, parses `/apply/{slug}` anchors with cheerio, and fans out to job detail pages. `companySlug` must be `{orgId}/{orgSlug}` form. No auth. |
| 310 | [Source ATS Plugin: CATS](../.specify/specs/310-source-ats-catsone/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/310-source-ats-catsone/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/310-source-ats-catsone/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #403); spec complete. CATS (catsone.com) — server-rendered HTML portal `https://{slug}.catsone.com/careers/{portalID}-{name}` parsed with cheerio (`.cats-job` cards, three fallback selector layers), paginated via `?page=N`, with per-job detail fetches for descriptions. The authenticated v3 `Authorization: Token` API is not used. No auth. |
| 311 | [Source ATS Plugin: Recruit CRM](../.specify/specs/311-source-ats-recruitcrm/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/311-source-ats-recruitcrm/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/311-source-ats-recruitcrm/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #403); spec complete. Recruit CRM — calls the same anonymous backend the public agency jobs SPA uses: POST `https://albatross.recruitcrm.io/v1/external-pages/jobs-by-account/get?account={slug}&batch=true` (`Origin: https://recruitcrm.io`, body `{limit,offset,search_data:{},onlyJobs:true}`), paginated by `offset`. The credentialed `api.recruitcrm.io` Bearer API is not used. No auth. |
| 312 | [Source ATS Plugin: Vincere](../.specify/specs/312-source-ats-vincere/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/312-source-ats-vincere/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/312-source-ats-vincere/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #403); spec complete. Vincere — anonymous GET `/careers/` for the per-session CSRF token, then pages POST `https://{slug}.vincere.io/careers/ajax/search-jobs` → `{ items, total, more }` (10/page) with structured JSON (HTML descriptions, location, type, publish date). The OAuth2 `/api/v2/job/search/` API is not used. No secret credentials. |
| 313 | [Source ATS Plugin: Factorial](../.specify/specs/313-source-ats-factorial/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/313-source-ats-factorial/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/313-source-ats-factorial/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #403); spec complete. Factorial — no anonymous JSON API, so it reads the verified public career page `https://{slug}.factorialhr.com` (jobs in `data-controller="job-postings"` HTML attrs) + `/sitemap.xml` for dates + per-job `/job_posting/{slug}-{id}` detail pages (bounded fan-out, concurrency 6). The OAuth2 REST API is not used. No auth. |
| 314 | [Source ATS Plugin: Workstream](../.specify/specs/314-source-ats-workstream/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/314-source-ats-workstream/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/314-source-ats-workstream/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #403); spec complete. Workstream (hourly-hiring) — scrapes the public HTML careers page `https://www.workstream.us/j/{accountId}/{brandSlug}/positions`, extracts job links, and fans out to detail pages; `atsId` = 8-char hex job-id suffix. `companySlug` is `{accountId}/{brandSlug}` form. The OAuth2 `public-api.workstream.us` API is not used. No auth. |
| 315 | [Source ATS Plugin: Harri](../.specify/specs/315-source-ats-harri/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/315-source-ats-harri/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/315-source-ats-harri/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #403); spec complete. Harri (hospitality) — scrapes public employer careers HTML `https://harri.com/{slug}`, parses `/{slug}/job/{jobId}-{titleSlug}` links, and fans out to detail pages parsing Open Graph meta tags. No anonymous JSON API; `datePosted` is null. No auth. |
| 316 | [Source ATS Plugin: Tribepad](../.specify/specs/316-source-ats-tribepad/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/316-source-ats-tribepad/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/316-source-ats-tribepad/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #403); spec complete. Tribepad (UK enterprise ATS) — cheerio HTML scrape of `https://{slug}.tribepad-gro.com/v2/job/search?page={n}` (`.sitebuilder-job-results-item` cards) + per-job `/members/modules/job/detail.php?record={id}` detail fetches. Verified live (getsetuk 18 jobs, ypocareers 3 jobs). No auth. |
| 317 | [Source ATS Plugin: Eploy](../.specify/specs/317-source-ats-eploy/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/317-source-ats-eploy/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/317-source-ats-eploy/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #403); spec complete. Eploy (UK) — reads the verified public XML datafeed `{tenantUrl}/feeds/datafeed.ashx?Format=xml` (`<Vacancies Count="N">/<Item>`) parsed with cheerio in xmlMode; single document, no pagination. Tenant from `companyUrl` (custom domain) or `companySlug` (eploy.net staging). The OAuth2 `/api/vacancies/search` API is not used. No auth. |
| 318 | [Source ATS Plugin: Oorwin](../.specify/specs/318-source-ats-oorwin/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/318-source-ats-oorwin/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/318-source-ats-oorwin/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #403); spec complete. Oorwin (staffing/talent) — anonymous POST `https://api.oorwin.ai/api/v2/careers/getJobList` (tenant via `sub_domain` body field, paged by `limit`+`page`) + per-job POST `careers/job_view` for HTML descriptions. Verified live against `purpledrive` (2 804 jobs). No auth. |
| 319 | [Source ATS Plugin: Ceipal](../.specify/specs/319-source-ats-ceipal/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/319-source-ats-ceipal/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/319-source-ats-ceipal/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #404); spec complete. Ceipal (US staffing ATS) — anonymous career-portal API `GET https://api.ceipal.com/{apiKey}/job-postings/?page={n}` (+ per-job `/{id}/` detail), tenant identified by career-portal API key in the URL path. Heuristic confidence (wire shape from the reference client; tenant keys rotate). No auth. |
| 320 | [Source ATS Plugin: Softgarden](../.specify/specs/320-source-ats-softgarden/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/320-source-ats-softgarden/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/320-source-ats-softgarden/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #404); spec complete. Softgarden (German ATS) — public schema.org `GET {tenantOrigin}/jobs.feed.json` (DataFeed of JobPosting; inline HTML descriptions, structured location, no detail fan-out). Verified live (10 jobs). The credentialed v2/v3 jobboard REST APIs are not used. No auth. |
| 321 | [Source ATS Plugin: Recruitis](../.specify/specs/321-source-ats-recruitis/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/321-source-ats-recruitis/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/321-source-ats-recruitis/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #404); spec complete. Recruitis (Czech ATS) — cheerio scrape of public career site `https://jobs.recruitis.io/{tenant}?page={n}` (`div.row.job` blocks) + per-job `#job-description` detail fan-out. Verified live (recruitisio 6, allwyn 4). The token-gated `api2/jobs` REST API is not used. No auth. |
| 322 | [Source ATS Plugin: Flatchr](../.specify/specs/322-source-ats-flatchr/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/322-source-ats-flatchr/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/322-source-ats-flatchr/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #404); spec complete. Flatchr (French ATS) — public `GET https://careers.flatchr.io/company/{slug}.json` returning `{items:[...]}` with full inline vacancy records (description, address, contract, salary, remote) — one call per tenant, no detail fan-out. Verified live (flatchr 3, groupeaudeo 2). No auth. |
| 323 | [Source ATS Plugin: Jobsoid](../.specify/specs/323-source-ats-jobsoid/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/323-source-ats-jobsoid/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/323-source-ats-jobsoid/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #404); spec complete. Jobsoid — public anonymous JSON feed `GET https://{tenant}.jobsoid.com/api/v1/jobs` (flat array of full job objects with inline HTML description, structured location, function/department, hostedUrl/applyUrl). Verified live (simpler, 3 jobs). Client-side slice + de-dup. No auth. |
| 324 | [Source ATS Plugin: Skeeled](../.specify/specs/324-source-ats-skeeled/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/324-source-ats-skeeled/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/324-source-ats-skeeled/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #404); spec complete. Skeeled (Luxembourg ATS) — public board page `GET https://app.skeeled.com/board/{boardId}` SSR Nuxt data island (offers in `<script id="__NUXT_DATA__">`); i18n title/description resolver + HTML-card fallback. Verified live (2 boards: 2 and 44 offers). The credentialed REST API is not used. No auth. |
| 325 | [Source ATS Plugin: Teamdash](../.specify/specs/325-source-ats-teamdash/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/325-source-ats-teamdash/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/325-source-ats-teamdash/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #404); spec complete. Teamdash (Estonian ATS) — public SSR career page `https://{tenant}.teamdash.com/p/job/{landingToken}/{slug}` with inline `window.context` JSON (feed + per-posting `landing.data.blocks[]` HTML); no anonymous JSON API exists. Verified live (cr14, 2 jobs). No auth. |
| 326 | [Source ATS Plugin: DigitalRecruiters](../.specify/specs/326-source-ats-digitalrecruiters/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/326-source-ats-digitalrecruiters/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/326-source-ats-digitalrecruiters/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #404); spec complete. DigitalRecruiters (French ATS) — public `POST https://api.digitalrecruiters.com/public/v1/careers-site/job-ads?domainName={domain}` (paged) + per-job detail + config endpoint to resolve domain/region-locale. Verified live (Segula 681, La Boucherie 58). No auth. |
| 327 | [Source ATS Plugin: Concludis](../.specify/specs/327-source-ats-concludis/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/327-source-ats-concludis/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/327-source-ats-concludis/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #404); spec complete. concludis (German ATS) — public server-rendered listing `GET https://{tenant}.concludis.de/prj/lst/{hash}/...htm?page={n}` (cheerio rows) + best-effort detail with schema.org JSON-LD. Verified live (hwk-stuttgart 3, smurfitkappa 206 pagination). No auth. |
| 328 | [Source ATS Plugin: rexx systems](../.specify/specs/328-source-ats-rexx/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/328-source-ats-rexx/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/328-source-ats-rexx/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #404); spec complete. rexx systems (German ATS) — public listing `GET https://{tenant}-portal.rexx-systems.com/stellenangebote.html` (cheerio `article.joboffer_container`) + per-job detail with schema.org JobPosting JSON-LD. Verified live (icotek 3, nobix). No anonymous XML feed exists. No auth. |
| 329 | [Source ATS Plugin: PCRecruiter](../.specify/specs/329-source-ats-pcrecruiter/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/329-source-ats-pcrecruiter/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/329-source-ats-pcrecruiter/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #404); spec complete. PCRecruiter (US staffing ATS) — public job board `GET https://www2.pcrecruiter.net/pcrbin/jobboard.aspx?uid={DisplayName}.{db}` (cheerio `table#joblist`) + per-job detail with schema.org JSON-LD. Verified live (Alliance Staffing, 38 jobs). No auth. |
| 330 | [Source ATS Plugin: Prescreen](../.specify/specs/330-source-ats-prescreen/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/330-source-ats-prescreen/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/330-source-ats-prescreen/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #404); spec complete. Prescreen (Austrian ATS) — public candidate portal `https://{handle}.onlyfy.jobs/` (`#jobList` rows) + `/job/{token}` JSON-LD + `/job/show/{token}/full` description fragment. Verified live (v2c2, 3 jobs). Legacy jobbase.io/prescreenapp.io hosts redirect here; retired JSON feed not used. No auth. |
| 331 | [Source ATS Plugin: Traffit](../.specify/specs/331-source-ats-traffit/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/331-source-ats-traffit/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/331-source-ats-traffit/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #405); spec complete. Generic multi-tenant Traffit adapter over the public, anonymous published-adverts feed (`GET https://{tenant}.traffit.com/public/job_posts/published`), keyed by the tenant sub-domain label. Parses the JSON array of advert envelopes, resolving `advert.values[]` by `field_id` (description HTML, structured geolocation). No auth. Verified live 2026-06-03 (people.traffit.com — 12 adverts). |
| 332 | [Source ATS Plugin: HR-ON Recruit](../.specify/specs/332-source-ats-hron/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/332-source-ats-hron/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/332-source-ats-hron/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #405); spec complete. Multi-tenant adapter for HR-ON Recruit (hr-on.com) public career pages, keyed by companyUrl/companySlug. Harvests `/jobposts?jobid={ID}` detail links from the server-rendered career page via a theme-independent regex, then fans out (bounded `Promise.allSettled`) to each detail page and parses title/company/location/description from rendered HTML plus an optional schema.org JobPosting JSON-LD block. No auth. Verified live 2026-06-03 (6 roles). Unknown tenants/parse errors degrade to empty. |
| 333 | [Source ATS Plugin: Sage HR](../.specify/specs/333-source-ats-sagehr/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/333-source-ats-sagehr/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/333-source-ats-sagehr/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #405); spec complete. Generic multi-tenant Sage HR (sage.hr) careers adapter keyed by the tenant career-site UUID. Scrapes the public, anonymous vacancies listing (`GET https://talent.sage.hr/{careerSiteId}/vacancies`) with cheerio for `div.job` cards, then fans out to `/jobs/{positionId}` detail pages for employment type, location, company name, and description. No auth (the `X-Auth-Token` REST API is a non-goal). Verified live 2026-06-03 (2 jobs). Graceful empty/partial degradation. |
| 334 | [Source ATS Plugin: CareerPlug](../.specify/specs/334-source-ats-careerplug/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/334-source-ats-careerplug/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/334-source-ats-careerplug/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #405); spec complete. Ingests any CareerPlug tenant's public careers site at `https://{tenant}.careerplug.com/jobs` (with an `/account` landing-page fallback for single-job tenants) by parsing the embedded schema.org ItemList of JobPosting JSON-LD via cheerio, pairing each posting with its `/jobs/{id}` or `/j/{shortcode}` job-card anchor for the URL and ATS id. No auth. Verified live 2026-06-03 (cplugjobs tenant). |
| 335 | [Source ATS Plugin: Webcruiter](../.specify/specs/335-source-ats-webcruiter/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/335-source-ats-webcruiter/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/335-source-ats-webcruiter/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #405); spec complete. Generic multi-tenant adapter over Webcruiter's public, unauthenticated candidate-portal JSON API (candidate.webcruiter.com), keyed by a tenant's numeric `companyLock` id. Fetches the open-roles list via `POST /api/odvert/companysearch/{lock}` with a `{take,skip}` body and maps each advert directly to `JobPostDto` (no per-advert detail fan-out). No auth. Verified live 2026-06-03 (locks 77790000 — 65 roles, 23109900 — 13). Unknown tenants return `{Total:0,Data:[]}` and degrade to empty. |
| 336 | [Source ATS Plugin: d.vinci](../.specify/specs/336-source-ats-dvinci/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/336-source-ats-dvinci/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/336-source-ats-dvinci/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #405); spec complete. Generic multi-tenant d.vinci adapter over the vendor's public Job Publication REST API (`GET https://{slug}.dvinci-hr.com/jobPublication/list.json`), a single anonymous JSON-array fetch per tenant parsed directly into `JobPostDto` (structured `jobOpening.locations` + free-text fallback, HTML content sections format-converted). No auth (API is "always public"). Verified live 2026-06-03 (inverto — 60 jobs, vhw — 2). |
| 337 | [Source ATS Plugin: Heyrecruit](../.specify/specs/337-source-ats-heyrecruit/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/337-source-ats-heyrecruit/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/337-source-ats-heyrecruit/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #405); spec complete. Generic multi-tenant adapter for Heyrecruit careers portals (heyrecruit.de). Fetches the public, anonymous overview page `GET https://{subdomain}.heyrecruit.de/?page=jobs` and parses each `.job-tile` with cheerio, decoding the HTML-entity-encoded job JSON embedded in each tile's `jobClickEventListener(...)` onclick handler (visible tile title + detail anchor fallback); the authenticated `app.heyrecruit.de/api/v2` JWT API is a non-goal. No credentials. Verified live 2026-06-03 (bodenseetherme — 4 jobs). |
| 338 | [Source ATS Plugin: TalentAdore](../.specify/specs/338-source-ats-talentadore/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/338-source-ats-talentadore/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/338-source-ats-talentadore/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #405); spec complete. Generic multi-tenant adapter over TalentAdore's public, unauthenticated positions JSON feed (`GET https://ats.talentadore.com/positions/{feedKey}/json`); the tenant careers slug (`{tenant}.careers.talentadore.com`) is resolved to its opaque feed key by harvesting the embedded reference from the career page, or the feed key is passed directly. Parses the `{version,company,generated_at,jobs[]}` envelope. No auth. Verified live 2026-06-03 (amersports — 36 roles). |
| 339 | [Source ATS Plugin: JobDiva](../.specify/specs/339-source-ats-jobdiva/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/339-source-ats-jobdiva/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/339-source-ats-jobdiva/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #406); spec complete. Generic multi-tenant adapter over JobDiva's public, unauthenticated candidate-portal XML feeds (`getportaljobs.jsp?a={portalId}` primary, `listofportaljobs.jsp` fallback), keyed by an opaque portal key. Parses the `<outertag><jobs><job>` XML envelope via cheerio. No auth. Verified live 2026-06-03. |
| 340 | [Source ATS Plugin: EasyCruit](../.specify/specs/340-source-ats-easycruit/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/340-source-ats-easycruit/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/340-source-ats-easycruit/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #406); spec complete. Generic multi-tenant adapter over EasyCruit's (Visma) public per-tenant vacancy-list XML feed (`https://{tenant}.easycruit.com/export/xml/vacancy/list.xml`, namespace `urn:EasyCruit`). Prefers the English language version, dedupes by atsId. No auth. Verified live 2026-06-03 (esvagt). |
| 341 | [Source ATS Plugin: Varbi](../.specify/specs/341-source-ats-varbi/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/341-source-ats-varbi/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/341-source-ats-varbi/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #406); spec complete. Generic multi-tenant adapter for Varbi (Swedish recruitment ATS). Fetches the public tenant career page (`https://{tenant}.varbi.com/en/`), parses the server-rendered listing table, then enriches the bounded result set from each job-ad page. No auth. Verified live 2026-06-03 (kth — 60 roles). |
| 342 | [Source ATS Plugin: Talentsoft](../.specify/specs/342-source-ats-talentsoft/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/342-source-ats-talentsoft/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/342-source-ats-talentsoft/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #406); spec complete. Generic multi-tenant adapter over Talentsoft's (Cegid) public per-tenant RSS offer export (`/handlers/offerRss.ashx?LCID={lcid}` on `{tenant}-recrute.talent-soft.com`). Dependency-free RSS parse. No auth. Verified live 2026-06-03 (Elis — ~326 offers). |

| 349 | [Source ATS Plugin: Arcoro](../.specify/specs/349-source-ats-arcoro/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/349-source-ats-arcoro/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/349-source-ats-arcoro/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #407); spec complete. No auth. Verified live 2026-06-03. |

No auth. Defensive parser with graceful degradation. |

Solid.Jobs (solid.jobs, Poland) — regional Polish job board with a strong IT focus and mandatory salary transparency, scraped via the free unauthenticated public JSON API `https://solid.jobs/public-api/offers/{division}?campaign=api`. Defaults to the `it` division (500 live IT roles probed 2026-06-11; eight divisions verified live incl. `engineering` and `finances`); `SOLIDJOBS_DIVISIONS` env var widens coverage, fanned out with `Promise.allSettled`. Maps PLN monthly salary ranges, contract time, locations, remote flag and HTML descriptions into the canonical DTO; `Site.SOLIDJOBS` is distinct from the Brazilian ATS `Site.SOLIDES`. **Verified live 2026-06-11**. Graceful degradation. |
| 719 | [Ashby Public Compensation Parameter](../.specify/specs/719-ashby-public-compensation/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/719-ashby-public-compensation/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/719-ashby-public-compensation/tasks.md) | All phases done (ad-hoc session 2026-06-11); spec complete. Public Ashby Job Posting API requests now opt in to salary data via `?includeCompensation=true` (live probe 2026-06-11: board `ramp` returns 0/110 jobs with compensation without the parameter, 110/110 with it), and the live flat compensation wire shape (`summaryComponents[]` / `compensationTiers[].components[]` with `minValue`/`maxValue`/`currencyCode`/`interval`) maps into `CompensationDto` alongside the pre-existing tiered shape; interval labels like `"1 YEAR"` are normalised before `getCompensationInterval()`. The public GET also gains a bounded retry (≤ 2 retries on network error/timeout/HTTP 5xx, exponential backoff + jitter, no retry on 4xx); `scrape()` still never throws. |
| 720 | [Workday Relative Posted-Date Parsing](../.specify/specs/720-workday-relative-posted-dates/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/720-workday-relative-posted-dates/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/720-workday-relative-posted-dates/tasks.md) | All phases done (ad-hoc session 2026-06-11); spec complete. Workday's public job-list endpoint returns `postedOn` as relative labels ("Posted Today", "Posted 3 Days Ago", "Posted 30+ Days Ago") which previously leaked into `JobPostDto.datePosted` as raw non-date strings. New exported pure helper `parseWorkdayPostedOn(postedOn?, now?)` in `workday.constants.ts` converts Today / Yesterday / "N Days Ago" labels into calendar-correct ISO dates (UTC-based arithmetic, deterministic under test via injectable `now`); lower-bound "N+ Days Ago" labels and unrecognised input map to `null` instead of the raw label; ISO-shaped absolute dates pass through as written. The helper never throws. |
| 721 | [Liveness Checker Feature Plugin (HTTP)](../.specify/specs/721-liveness-http/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/721-liveness-http/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/721-liveness-http/tasks.md) | All phases done (ad-hoc session 2026-06-11); spec complete. HTTP-only job-posting liveness classifier shipped as a feature plugin (like the dedup engine — no `Site` enum entry), bound under `LIVENESS_CHECKER_TOKEN` with the public contract (`ILivenessChecker`, `LivenessVerdict`, `LivenessCode`) in `@ever-jobs/models`. Deterministic prioritised classification — HTTP status first, then post-redirect `error=true` URL marker, then multilingual (EN/DE/FR/ES/PL) body heuristics — yields `active`/`expired`/`uncertain` verdicts with machine-readable codes; HTTP 403/503 and bot-challenge interstitials are never classified `expired`. `checkBatch` runs with bounded concurrency (default 5), optional jittered throttling, input-order-preserving results and per-URL failure isolation; `check()` never throws. |
| 722 | [Dedup-Hybrid Performance Gates & Adaptive LSH Banding](../.specify/specs/722-dedup-hybrid-perf-lsh/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/722-dedup-hybrid-perf-lsh/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/722-dedup-hybrid-perf-lsh/tasks.md) | All phases done (ad-hoc session 2026-06-11); spec complete. Closes the four dedup-hybrid follow-ups flagged in commit `008ed8a6` / the run #11 log. A V8 CPU profile attributed 72.7 % of Jest-run self-time to per-call `Math.imul` global lookups in the MinHash hot loop (slow named-property interceptor loads on `vm`-contextified globals); fixed by a module-scope `imul` binding plus a permutation-major inlined hot loop, with a golden byte-equality test pinning signature stability. LSH banding is now derived from `similarityThreshold` when `bands` is omitted (smallest divisor with recall ≥ 0.95 at the threshold; defaults still derive the historical B=16), fixing the lenient-threshold clustering bug. Identical texts share one signature via slot grouping, and an internal Union-Find skips already-connected candidates and emits merged components, making duplicate-heavy batches near-linear. All perf gates pass at original budgets (250 ms / 2 500 ms / 500 ms); new CI job **Test (Feature Plugins)** runs the hermetic dedup/merge/store/liveness suites on every push. |
| 723 | [Source Company Plugin: Agility Robotics](../.specify/specs/723-source-company-agilityrobotics/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/723-source-company-agilityrobotics/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/723-source-company-agilityrobotics/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #434); spec complete. Agility Robotics (Robotics / Humanoid robots, Salem, Oregon, USA) — Agility Robotics designs and manufactures Digit, a human-centric bipedal robot built to operate in warehouses and logistics environments alongside people. The company runs RoboFab, a high-volume humanoid-robot factory, and targets material-handling tasks such as tote moving and pallet building. Greenhouse-hosted company-direct board (slug `agilityrobotics`), 44 live role(s) probed 2026-06-12. **Verified live 2026-06-12**. Graceful degradation. |

It partners with Stanford, UC Berkeley and UCSF and gives scientists long-horizon funding to study complex diseases such as cancer, neurodegeneration and immune dysfunction. Greenhouse-hosted company-direct board (slug `arcinstitute`), 26 live role(s) probed 2026-06-12. **Verified live 2026-06-12**. Graceful degradation. |

| 727 | [Source Company Plugin: Zola](../.specify/specs/727-source-company-zola/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/727-source-company-zola/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/727-source-company-zola/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #434); spec complete. | 730 | [Source Company Plugin: QphoX](../.specify/specs/730-source-company-qphox/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/730-source-company-qphox/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/730-source-company-qphox/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #434); spec complete. | 731 | [Source Company Plugin: Zencoder](../.specify/specs/731-source-company-zencoder/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/731-source-company-zencoder/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/731-source-company-zencoder/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #434); spec complete. | 740 | [Corpus Signals on the Public DTO (liveness + legitimacy)](../.specify/specs/740-corpus-signals-dto/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/740-corpus-signals-dto/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/740-corpus-signals-dto/tasks.md) | All phases done (2026-06-15); spec complete. Surfaces two **opt-in** corpus-level trust signals on the public `JobPostDto` for the candidate-side consumer (Hust): **liveness** (`active`/`expired`/`uncertain`, reusing the Spec 721 `liveness-http` checker, via `?liveness=true`) and **legitimacy** (`verified`/`likely`/`uncertain` with explainable reasons, via a new deterministic `legitimacy-detector` feature plugin bound under `LEGITIMACY_CHECKER_TOKEN`, via `?legitimacy=true`). Both off by default — no change to the default payload or latency. `JobsController` opt-in enrichment with `@Optional()`-injected checkers (graceful when unbound; liveness degrades to `uncertain` on failure). Build green; 10 unit/integration tests green. |
| 741 | [Source ATS Plugin: Beisen (iTalent)](../.specify/specs/741-source-ats-beisen/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/741-source-ats-beisen/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/741-source-ats-beisen/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #435, 2026-06-18); spec complete. Generic, multi-tenant adapter for the Beisen (北森 / "iTalent") cloud-HR recruitment platform — the largest enterprise HR SaaS in the China region, powering the public career sites of a large roster of major China-operating employers at `https://{slug}.zhiye.com`. Deterministic two-step, no-auth flow: (1) GET `/portal/registerSystemInfo` → extract the inline `BSGlobal.PortalId` (+ branded `Name`) via a string-aware balanced-brace JSON scan; (2) POST `/api/Jobad/GetJobAdPageList` with the `PortalId`, paginated via `PageIndex`/`PageSize=50` until exhausted or the envelope `Count` is reached. Maps `JobAdId`→`beisen-{id}` / URL `…/portal/jobs/{id}`, `JobAdName`, `LocNames[]`→location, joined `Duty`+`Require`→description, `Category`→department, `Salary`, `ChangeDate`/`PostDate` (the `0001-01-01` unset sentinel ignored). EN + ZH (远程/居家办公) remote detection. `companySlug` (bare subdomain or full `*.zhiye.com` URL) / `companyUrl` resolution. Legacy non-`BSGlobal` portals, WAF-gated tenants, HTTP/transport/parse failures all degrade to empty/partial — never throw. Sibling to MokaHR (Spec 387). Build green; 19 unit tests green. |
| 5001 | [Shared Job-Location Parser](../.specify/specs/5001-shared-job-location-parser/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/5001-shared-job-location-parser/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/5001-shared-job-location-parser/tasks.md) | Implemented 2026-06-22. Adds conservative US city/state splitting, case-insensitive hybrid/remote qualifier extraction, canonical workplace values, remote signaling, and lossless fallback under `@ever-jobs/common`. |
| 5002 | [Source Company Plugin: Anatar](../.specify/specs/5002-source-company-anatar/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/5002-source-company-anatar/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/5002-source-company-anatar/tasks.md) | Implemented 2026-06-22. Adds the complete first-party Anatar company source: bounded Next Flight parsing, semantic rendered-card fallback, stable deep links and IDs, shared type/email/location helpers, input filtering, graceful degradation, four-point registration, and fixture coverage. |
| 5003 | [Rippling Pagination and Job Details](../.specify/specs/5003-source-ats-rippling-pagination-and-details/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/5003-source-ats-rippling-pagination-and-details/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/5003-source-ats-rippling-pagination-and-details/tasks.md) | Implemented 2026-06-22. Extends the upstream Rippling source with complete pagination, strict record admission, stable-ID deduplication, bounded detail enrichment, HTML/Markdown/plain descriptions, and final type, URL, and location mappings. Focused suite: 16 tests green. |
| 5004 | [Workday Detail Enrichment](../.specify/specs/5004-workday-detail-enrichment/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/5004-workday-detail-enrichment/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/5004-workday-detail-enrichment/tasks.md) | Implemented 2026-06-22. Enriches selected Workday summaries through their public CXS detail endpoints in ordered batches of five. Adds HTML/Markdown/plain descriptions, deduplicated concrete multi-location labels, source-authored `hiringOrganization.name`, detail metadata, and per-job graceful fallback. Live-reproduced with X-energy; focused suite: 35 tests green. |
| 5005 | [Rippling Authoritative Detail Fields](../.specify/specs/5005-rippling-authoritative-detail-fields/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/5005-rippling-authoritative-detail-fields/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/5005-rippling-authoritative-detail-fields/tasks.md) | Implemented 2026-06-22. Fetches every selected Rippling detail record and overlays source-authored company identity, complete creation timestamp, and raw employment-type label with list fallbacks and bounded failure isolation. Boom Supersonic regression covered; focused suite: 17 tests green. |
| 5006 | [Lever Complete Public Descriptions](../.specify/specs/5006-lever-complete-public-descriptions/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/5006-lever-complete-public-descriptions/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/5006-lever-complete-public-descriptions/tasks.md) | Implemented 2026-06-22. Assembles Lever public descriptions from combined/opening/body text, every `lists[]` heading/body section, and additional closing text using shared public/authenticated mapping. Enigma regression covered; focused suite green. |
| 5007 | [Shared Interval and Multi-Location Normalization](../.specify/specs/5007-shared-interval-and-location-normalization/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/5007-shared-interval-and-location-normalization/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/5007-shared-interval-and-location-normalization/tasks.md) | Implemented 2026-06-23. Adds conservative count-one compensation interval normalization, shared multi-location canonicalization, Ashby wiring, and private investigator reuse of repo normalization helpers. Ashby live check clean. |
| 5008 | [Ashby Field-Name Fallbacks](../.specify/specs/5008-ashby-field-name-fallbacks/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/5008-ashby-field-name-fallbacks/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/5008-ashby-field-name-fallbacks/tasks.md) | Implemented 2026-06-23. Maps `datePosted`, `department`, and `team` from the public job-board names (`publishedAt`, `department`, `team`) with authenticated-name fallbacks, fixing a 100% null rate on the public path across 1789 harvested jobs. Private investigator aligned to the same names. |
| 5009 | [Greenhouse Entity Content and Locations](../.specify/specs/5009-greenhouse-entity-content-and-locations/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/5009-greenhouse-entity-content-and-locations/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/5009-greenhouse-entity-content-and-locations/tasks.md) | Implemented 2026-06-23. Detects and pre-decodes entity-encoded `content` before `htmlToPlainText` (fixing literal-tag descriptions on 100% of public jobs), routes `location.name` through `parseLocationList` for `location`/`isRemote`/`workFromHomeType`, and maps `currency_range` metadata to `CompensationDto` plus `Employment Type` to `employmentType`. |
| 5010 | [Lever Field Mappings](../.specify/specs/5010-lever-field-mappings/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/5010-lever-field-mappings/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/5010-lever-field-mappings/tasks.md) | Implemented 2026-06-23. Maps four unmapped Lever public-path fields across 1116 harvested jobs: `salaryRange` → `CompensationDto` honoring the real interval (per-hour/-month/-year, not coerced to yearly), `categories.department` → `department`, multi-site `allLocations` through `parseLocationList`, and `workplaceType` → `workFromHomeType`/`isRemote`. Folds the ISO-2 `country` into `LocationDto.country` via a new zero-dependency `regionNameFromCode` (`Intl.DisplayNames`) helper. Private investigator emits Lever department/compensation. |
| 5011 | [Normalize Location Remote Regex](../.specify/specs/5011-normalize-location-remote-regex/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/5011-normalize-location-remote-regex/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/5011-normalize-location-remote-regex/tasks.md) | Implemented 2026-06-23. Drops the `/g` flag from `LOCATION_REMOTE_TOKENS` in `normalize.ts`; the flag made the shared regex stateful under `.test()`, so consecutive calls alternated match/no-match by order, leaving `'Anywhere'`/`'Remote, US'` un-normalized and breaking Remote-vs-Anywhere dedup in `canonicalKey`. Adds a repeated-call regression test. Fixes 3 pre-existing failing tests inherited from upstream `develop`. |
| 5012 | [Rippling Compensation and WorkFromHomeType](../.specify/specs/5012-rippling-compensation-workfromhometype/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/5012-rippling-compensation-workfromhometype/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/5012-rippling-compensation-workfromhometype/tasks.md) | Implemented 2026-06-23. Fixes compensation (null on 100% of jobs): copies `payRangeDetails` in `enrichJobFromDetail`, corrects the `RipplingPayRangeDetail` shape (`rangeStart`/`rangeEnd`/`frequency`), reads structured bands first with a min–max envelope and semicolon-joined per-band `salarySource` for distinct ranges, and falls back to the shared `extractSalary` over the description body. Derives `workFromHomeType` from per-location `workplaceType`, and routes multi-location through `parseLocationList`. 26 unit tests (10 new). |
| 5013 | [Workday Field Mappings](../.specify/specs/5013-workday-field-mappings/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/5013-workday-field-mappings/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/5013-workday-field-mappings/tasks.md) | Implemented 2026-06-23. Maps five gaps across a 2754-job / 7-board harvest: compensation (null on 100%; Workday CXS has no structured pay field, so `extractSalary` runs over the description body), `workFromHomeType` from `remoteType`, multi-location via `parseLocationList` (dropping the bare "N Locations" count), country via the zero-dep `regionNameFromCode` from `jobRequisitionLocation.country.alpha2Code`, and `datePosted` preferring the absolute `startDate` over the lossy relative `postedOn` label. Department left as-is (none in CXS). 45 unit tests (10 new). |
| 5014 | [Workable Detail Fetch Fields](../.specify/specs/5014-workable-detail-fetch-fields/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/5014-workable-detail-fetch-fields/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/5014-workable-detail-fetch-fields/tasks.md) | Implemented 2026-06-23. The plugin read only the v1 widget list (no body, no work-mode). Now overlays each job with its public v2 per-job detail (`/api/v2/accounts/{slug}/jobs/{shortcode}`) under bounded concurrency (`WORKABLE_DETAIL_CONCURRENCY = 5`, `Promise.allSettled`, fail-safe), mapping `description` (concatenated `description`+`requirements`+`benefits`, rendered per `descriptionFormat`) and `workFromHomeType` (from the `workplace` enum). Also maps the widget `function` → `jobFunction` and broadens `isRemote` to union `telecommuting`, detail `remote`, and `workplace === 'remote'`. Compensation/department are non-goals (no source). 7 new service tests. |
| 5015 | [BreezyHR Location + Detail Description](../.specify/specs/5015-breezyhr-location-detail-description/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/5015-breezyhr-location-detail-description/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/5015-breezyhr-location-detail-description/tasks.md) | Implemented 2026-06-23. Fixes a location bug (the plugin stringified the `/json` list's `state`/`country` `{id,name}` objects into `"[object Object]"` inside `LocationDto.city`) by reading the structured pieces and routing through the shared `parseLocationList`. Adds `description` (null on 100%): overlays each job with the schema.org `JobPosting` body parsed from its public detail page (`/p/{friendly_id}`) under bounded concurrency (`BREEZYHR_DETAIL_CONCURRENCY = 5`, `Promise.allSettled`, fail-safe), rendered per `descriptionFormat`. Adds `compensation` from the list's free-text `salary` via the shared `extractSalary` (yearly/hourly), and `jobType`/`employmentType` from `type`. workFromHomeType/isRemote-broadening/multi-location are non-goals (no structured source in the harvest). 9 new service tests. |
| 742 | [Source Company Plugin: Butterfly Network](../.specify/specs/742-source-company-butterflynetwork/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/742-source-company-butterflynetwork/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/742-source-company-butterflynetwork/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #436, 2026-06-19); spec complete. Butterfly Network (Medical Devices / Digital Health, Burlington, Massachusetts, USA) — Butterfly Network is a digital health company that develops portable, semiconductor-based ultrasound technology paired with intuitive software. Its flagship products are handheld, single-probe whole-body ultrasound systems built on a proprietary Ultrasound-on-Chip platform, which connect to a smartphone or tablet to bring imaging to the point of care. The company aims to make medical imaging more affordable and accessible across hospitals, clinics, and field settings worldwide. Greenhouse-hosted company-direct board (slug `butterflynetwork`), 19 live role(s) probed 2026-06-19. **Verified live 2026-06-19** (`verified=false` until authenticated). Graceful degradation; ≥ 9-case mocked unit suite green. |
| 743 | [Source Company Plugin: Figure Lending](../.specify/specs/743-source-company-figure/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/743-source-company-figure/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/743-source-company-figure/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #436, 2026-06-19); spec complete. Figure Lending (Fintech / Lending, San Francisco, California, USA) — Figure Lending operates a technology platform for home equity lines of credit (HELOCs), using blockchain infrastructure to streamline origination, underwriting, and settlement. Founded in 2018, the company offers a fully digital application process that can deliver approvals in minutes and funding within days. Its software has been used to originate billions of dollars in home equity, making it one of the largest non-bank HELOC providers in the country. Founded in 2012 with roots at MIT, the company is headquartered in Woburn, Massachusetts (Greater Boston) and operates facilities in Shanghai, plus Singapore and Seoul. It positions itself as integrating AI across battery R&D, materials discovery, cell design, manufacturing, and battery health/safety monitoring. The board name "SES" maps to the publicly traded brand SES AI. | 975 | [Ashby Company-Source Pipeline](../.specify/specs/975-ashby-company-source-pipeline/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/975-ashby-company-source-pipeline/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/975-ashby-company-source-pipeline/tasks.md) | **Foundation shipped (run #441, 2026-07-02).** New deterministic **Ashby-backed** company-source pipeline — the sibling of the Greenhouse pipeline — closing the ~97 %-Greenhouse backend skew so companies hosting careers on Ashby (`jobs.ashbyhq.com/<slug>`) become discoverable. Adds `scripts/probe-ashby-company-source.ts` (public Ashby Posting API probe; pure `gateBoard`/`extractListings`; **11/11** unit tests) + `scripts/scaffold-ashby-company-source.ts` (pure emitter of the allencontrolsystems registry-delegation pattern + fixture + generic test + `.specify` spec); reuses the backend-agnostic `scripts/wire-company-source.ts`. Descriptor carries both `companySlug` (Ashby board slug) and `slug` (hyphen-free plugin dir/enum). End-to-end smoke: scaffold → wire → jest **9/9** → reverted. See `docs/questions.md` Q-ASHBY-1/2. First Ashby batch: 218 plugins landed under Specs 976–1193 (run #441). |

| 1194 | [Lever Company-Source Pipeline](../.specify/specs/1194-lever-company-source-pipeline/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/1194-lever-company-source-pipeline/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/1194-lever-company-source-pipeline/tasks.md) | **Foundation shipped (run #442, 2026-07-03).** New deterministic **Lever-backed** company-source pipeline — third sibling of the Greenhouse + Ashby pipelines — diversifying the company-direct corpus onto Lever (`jobs.lever.co/<slug>`). Adds `scripts/probe-lever-company-source.ts` (public Lever Postings API probe; pure `gateBoard`/`extractListings`; bare-array wire shape; **13/13** unit tests) + `scripts/scaffold-lever-company-source.ts` (pure emitter of the registry-delegation pattern + Lever fixture + generic test + `.specify` spec); reuses the backend-agnostic `scripts/wire-company-source.ts`. Descriptor carries both `companySlug` (live Lever slug) and `slug` (hyphen-free plugin dir/enum). End-to-end smoke: scaffold → wire → jest **9/9** → reverted. See `docs/questions.md` Q-LEVER-1/2. First Lever batch: 180 plugins landed under Specs 1195–1374 (run #442). |
| 1375 | [SmartRecruiters Company-Source Pipeline](../.specify/specs/1375-smartrecruiters-company-source-pipeline/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/1375-smartrecruiters-company-source-pipeline/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/1375-smartrecruiters-company-source-pipeline/tasks.md) | **Foundation shipped + first batch (run #443, 2026-07-04).** New deterministic **SmartRecruiters-backed** company-source pipeline — fourth sibling of the Greenhouse + Ashby + Lever pipelines — diversifying the company-direct corpus onto SmartRecruiters (`jobs.smartrecruiters.com/<Identifier>`), which over-indexes on **large enterprise brands** (AbbVie, AB InBev, Bosch, Visa, Western Digital, ServiceNow). Adds `scripts/probe-smartrecruiters-company-source.ts` (public Posting API probe; pure `gateBoard`/`extractListings`; **`{content:[...]}` envelope** wire shape; **15/15** unit tests) + `scripts/scaffold-smartrecruiters-company-source.ts` (pure emitter of the registry-delegation pattern + SmartRecruiters fixture + generic test + `.specify` spec) + `scripts/assemble-smartrecruiters-batch.ts` (deterministic descriptor join with digit-prefix/collision rejection) + `scripts/process-sr-discovery.ts` (discovery-output marshaling + HTML-entity decode); reuses the backend-agnostic `scripts/wire-company-source.ts`. Descriptor carries both `companySlug` (case-sensitive live identifier, e.g. `BoschGroup`) and `slug` (hyphen-free lowercase plugin dir/enum). End-to-end smoke: scaffold → wire → jest **9/9** → reverted. See `docs/questions.md` Q-SR-1/2. First SmartRecruiters batch: 217 plugins landed under Specs 1376–1592 (run #443; 220/223 discovery candidates survived the central gate; 3 rejected for digit-prefix enumKey or slug collision). |
| 1593 | [Recruitee Company-Source Pipeline](../.specify/specs/1593-recruitee-company-source-pipeline/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/1593-recruitee-company-source-pipeline/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/1593-recruitee-company-source-pipeline/tasks.md) | **Foundation shipped + first batch (run #444, 2026-07-05).** New deterministic **Recruitee-backed** company-source pipeline — fifth sibling of the Greenhouse + Ashby + Lever + SmartRecruiters pipelines — diversifying the company-direct corpus onto Recruitee (`<slug>.recruitee.com`), which over-indexes on **European (NL/DE/BE/FR) SMB and scale-up brands**. Adds `scripts/probe-recruitee-company-source.ts` (public careers API probe; pure `gateBoard`/`extractListings`/`boardUrl`; **`{offers:[...]}` envelope** wire shape; per-company subdomain host model; **19/19** unit tests) + `scripts/scaffold-recruitee-company-source.ts` (pure emitter of the registry-delegation pattern + Recruitee fixture + generic test + `.specify` spec) + `scripts/assemble-recruitee-batch.ts` (deterministic descriptor join with digit-prefix/collision rejection) + `scripts/process-recruitee-discovery.ts` (discovery-output marshaling + HTML-entity decode + seed-enrichment merge); reuses the backend-agnostic `scripts/wire-company-source.ts`. Descriptor carries both `companySlug` (live subdomain) and `slug` (hyphen-free plugin dir/enum). End-to-end smoke: scaffold → wire → jest **9/9** → reverted. See `docs/questions.md` Q-RECRUITEE-1/2. First Recruitee batch: 83 plugins landed under Specs 1594–1676 (run #444; 84/230 discovery candidates survived the central gate; 1 rejected for slug collision). |
| 1677 | [Workable Company-Source Pipeline](../.specify/specs/1677-workable-company-source-pipeline/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/1677-workable-company-source-pipeline/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/1677-workable-company-source-pipeline/tasks.md) | **Foundation shipped (run #445, 2026-07-06).** New deterministic **Workable-backed** company-source pipeline — sixth sibling of the Greenhouse + Ashby + Lever + SmartRecruiters + Recruitee pipelines — diversifying the company-direct corpus onto Workable (`apply.workable.com/api/v1/widget/accounts/<slug>`), which over-indexes on the **very large global startup / SMB population**. Adds `scripts/probe-workable-company-source.ts` (public widget API probe; pure `gateBoard`/`extractListings`/`boardUrl`; **`{jobs:[...]}` envelope** wire shape; shared-host model; stable per-job id `shortcode`; **21/21** unit tests) + `scripts/scaffold-workable-company-source.ts` (pure emitter of the registry-delegation pattern + Workable widget fixture + generic test + `.specify` spec) + `scripts/assemble-workable-batch.ts` (deterministic descriptor join with digit-prefix/collision rejection); reuses the backend-agnostic `scripts/wire-company-source.ts`. Descriptor carries both `companySlug` (live Workable account slug) and `slug` (hyphen-free plugin dir/enum). Probe hardened with polite throttling + Cloudflare-1015 backoff (the host rate-limits bursts). A reusable 382-company discovery corpus persisted at `scripts/seeds/workable-candidates.json`. End-to-end smoke: scaffold → wire → jest **9/9** → reverted. See `docs/questions.md` Q-WORKABLE-1. First Workable batch lands under Specs 1678+ (next run — the discovery burst rate-limited this run's live gate; seed corpus + gentle probe carry it forward). |

| 1676 | [Source Company Plugin: XSARUS](../.specify/specs/1676-source-company-xsarus/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/1676-source-company-xsarus/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/1676-source-company-xsarus/tasks.md) | All phases done (run #444, 2026-07-05); spec complete. XSARUS (E-commerce implementation agency / retail-tech services, Middelharnis, Netherlands) — **Recruitee**-hosted company-direct board (subdomain `xsarus`), 5 live role(s) probed 2026-07-05 (public Recruitee careers API). Registry-delegation to Site.RECRUITEE; `verified=false` until authenticated. Graceful degradation; mocked unit suite green. |
| 5016 | [BambooHR Detail Fields + Mappings](../.specify/specs/5016-bamboohr-detail-fields-mappings/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/5016-bamboohr-detail-fields-mappings/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/5016-bamboohr-detail-fields-mappings/tasks.md) | Implemented 2026-06-23. The public path read `description`/`compensation`/`minimumExperience` off `/careers/list`, but those keys live only on the per-job `/careers/{id}/detail` endpoint (null on 100%). Now overlays each job with its detail payload under bounded concurrency (`BAMBOOHR_DETAIL_CONCURRENCY = 5`, `Promise.allSettled`, fail-safe), mapping `description` (rendered per `descriptionFormat`), `datePosted` (ISO), and `compensation` (free-text via the shared `extractSalary`, yearly/hourly). Maps `workFromHomeType`/`isRemote` from `locationType` (0=on-site, 1=remote, 2=hybrid; `isRemote` was hardcoded `false`) and `jobType`/`employmentType` from `employmentStatusLabel`. Fixes type-shape bugs: `id: string | number`, drops dead list reads, and reads country from `atsLocation.country` (the list `location` has only `city`/`state`). Structured location instead of `parseLocationList` (BambooHR uses full state names). Measured on a 9-board / 78-job harvest. 15 new service tests. |
| 5017 | [Allen Control Systems → Ashby Delegation](../.specify/specs/5017-allencontrolsystems-ashby-delegation/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/5017-allencontrolsystems-ashby-delegation/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/5017-allencontrolsystems-ashby-delegation/tasks.md) | Implemented 2026-06-23. Repoints `source-company-allencontrolsystems` from its stale hardcoded Greenhouse board to the company's live, canonical Ashby board (`allen-control-systems`), verified against website + ATS discovery. Rather than re-implement Ashby parsing inline or import the peer plugin (forbidden by Rule #4), the service resolves the Ashby scraper at runtime via the core `PluginRegistry` (`@Optional()` constructor DI → `getScraper(Site.ASHBY)`), delegates `scrape({ ...input, companySlug: 'allen-control-systems' })`, then re-stamps the company identity (`site`, `companyName`, `id` `ashby-`→`allencontrolsystems-` prefix). Inherits every Ashby field fix automatically; fail-safe empty response when Ashby is unavailable. 10 service tests (real `AshbyService` in a registry + fake `IScraper` for pass-through/resilience). |
| 5018 | [Shared Structured-First Compensation Resolution](../.specify/specs/5018-shared-compensation-resolution/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/5018-shared-compensation-resolution/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/5018-shared-compensation-resolution/tasks.md) | Implemented 2026-06-23. Promotes the rippling structured-first → `extractSalary(description)` fallback into three shared `@ever-jobs/common` helpers (`compensationFromSalary`, `salaryToCompensation`, `resolveCompensation`) and applies them across all eight touched ATS plugins. Wires the description fallback into the four that lacked it (ashby, greenhouse incl. Harvest, lever, workable) and refactors the four hand-rolled mappings onto the helper (rippling, workday, breezyhr, bamboohr). Currency policy: structured sources keep their reported currency, text-parsed results default USD. Behavior-preserving (all prior fixtures green); 313 tests green across common + 8 ATS suites. |
| 5019 | [Multi-tier Compensation Aggregation](../.specify/specs/5019-multi-tier-compensation-aggregation/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/5019-multi-tier-compensation-aggregation/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/5019-multi-tier-compensation-aggregation/tasks.md) | Implemented 2026-06-23. Postings that list pay bands for several tiers (geo/level/work-mode) were collapsing to a single tier: ashby tiered reported only `tiers[0]`, ashby flat reported one component, and rippling folded `payRangeDetails[]` but hand-rolled the logic inline. Promotes that collapse into a shared `@ever-jobs/common` helper `aggregateCompensation(ranges)` that folds many bands into `min(floors)…max(ceilings)`, guarded so only ranges matching the first bounded band's currency+interval contribute (a stray EUR/hourly band is excluded, never converted). Refactors ashby (tiered + flat) and rippling onto it; a SF/NYC/remote posting now reports the true overall band. Behavior-preserving for rippling; new overall-range behavior for ashby. 321 tests green across common + ATS suites (+8 new). |
| 5020 | [Paylocity Board-Page Scrape](../.specify/specs/5020-paylocity-board-page-scrape/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/5020-paylocity-board-page-scrape/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/5020-paylocity-board-page-scrape/tasks.md) | Implemented 2026-06-23. The Paylocity JSON feed endpoint (`/recruiting/api/feed/jobs/{GUID}`) is disabled/partner-gated and returns 5xx/4xx for every tested company. Reworked the plugin to the reliable public source: parse the server-rendered board page (`/recruiting/jobs/All/{GUID}`) for `window.pageData.Jobs[]`, then overlay each job's detail page (`/recruiting/jobs/Details/{JobId}/{GUID}`) under bounded concurrency for the full description + Job Type. Maps the full field set (title, company, structured location, department, jobType, isRemote/workFromHomeType, datePosted, description, text-fallback compensation via `resolveCompensation`, emails). Fail-safe: a failed detail fetch still maps the board-level fields. Driven by 4 real captured fixtures (sendcutsend, fermi); network smoke test gated behind `RUN_NETWORK_E2E`. 9 unit tests green. |
| 5021 | [Manatal careers-page.com Rework](../.specify/specs/5021-manatal-careers-page-rework/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/5021-manatal-careers-page-rework/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/5021-manatal-careers-page-rework/tasks.md) | Implemented 2026-06-24. The Manatal plugin's endpoint `api.manatal.com/open/v1/career-page/{slug}/jobs/` now returns the SPA HTML shell (not JSON) for real customers, so it returned 0 jobs. Manatal hosts its public career pages on the white-label domain `careers-page.com`; repointed the plugin at its JSON API (`/api/v1.0/c/{slug}/jobs/`), the self-contained list the Vue front-end consumes (full HTML description, structured location, salary when `is_salary_visible`). Pagination follows the `next` chain (cap `MANATAL_MAX_PAGES=50`), no detail fetch. Applies the ATS checklist: structured-first→text-fallback compensation via `resolveCompensation` (interval inferred by magnitude when the API omits it), structured city/state/country with `parseLocationText` fallback, remote inference, description HTML/markdown/plain, emails, companyUrl/jobUrl; never fabricates employment_type/jobFunction/datePosted. Driven by 4 real captured fixtures (ghostwerks, calqulate, castelion p1+p2); network smoke gated behind `RUN_NETWORK_E2E`. 13 unit tests green. |
| 5022 | [Shared JSON-LD Extraction](../.specify/specs/5022-jsonld-shared-extraction/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/5022-jsonld-shared-extraction/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/5022-jsonld-shared-extraction/tasks.md) | Implemented 2026-06-24. schema.org `JobPosting` JSON-LD parsing was duplicated/private (breezyhr), unused-but-available (paylocity), and missing as a generic source. Adds a pure shared helper `parseJobPostingLd(html)` in `@ever-jobs/common` (with `extractLdJsonBlocks` + `jobPostingLdToCompensation`) that finds every `application/ld+json` block, parses defensively, unwraps single/array/`@graph`/`ItemList` shapes and `@type` string-or-array, and normalises title/description/datePosted/validThrough/employmentType/hiringOrganization/url/applyUrl/remote/locations/baseSalary. Refactors breezyhr onto it (removes private `descriptionFromHtml`). Enriches the paylocity detail overlay JSON-LD-first for description with HTML fallback (Job Type still from HTML; board-page spine unchanged). Adds a generic `source-jsonld` aggregator-bucket plugin (`Site.JSONLD`, category `job-board`) that harvests a careers/job URL's `JobPosting` blocks — last-resort for sites without a recognised ATS — applying the ATS checklist (structured-first compensation, underscore/multi-value job-type mapping, location, remote, description formats, emails). Registered in all four places. 21 new unit tests; build + suites green. |
| 5023 | [`source-ats-workatastartup`](../.specify/specs/5023-source-ats-workatastartup/spec.md) — [plan](../.specify/specs/5023-source-ats-workatastartup/plan.md) — [tasks](../.specify/specs/5023-source-ats-workatastartup/tasks.md) | Implemented 2026-06-24. New ATS plugin for YC Work at a Startup (WaaS), detected in fetch1 but previously unharvestable. WaaS is multi-tenant with two URL shapes for the same board: the canonical auth-gated `workatastartup.com/companies/{slug}` and the public YC mirror `ycombinator.com/companies/{slug}/jobs`. Harvests the YC mirror: the company jobs page embeds an Inertia.js `data-page` JSON blob (`props.company` + `props.jobPostings[]`) which is the list spine; each per-job detail page carries a schema.org `JobPosting` ld+json block parsed via the Spec 5022 `parseJobPostingLd` helper (detail overlay, bounded concurrency 5, `Promise.allSettled`, isolated failures). Applies the ATS checklist: structured-first ld+json baseSalary → min/max range with text `salaryRange` fallback via `resolveCompensation`; jobType from list `type` + ld `employmentType`; multi-location from ld `jobLocation` (semicolon-joined) with list `location` fallback; isRemote/workFromHomeType; datePosted; description HTML/markdown/plain; emails; `companyUrl`=canonical WaaS board, `jobUrl`=YC detail, `applyUrl`=WaaS/YC apply target. Driven by 5 real captured fixtures (diode list + 2 details, loombotic list + 1 detail); network smoke gated behind `RUN_NETWORK_E2E`. Registered in all four places. 12 unit tests green. |
